security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' asset: data: https://*.githubusercontent.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost http://127.0.0.1:5173 ws://127.0.0.1:5173 https://api.github.com https://github.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'

bundle.shortDescription: Scholarly Markdown and LaTeX writing workspace
bundle.longDescription: Scholia Studio is a cross-platform Markdown/LaTeX workspace for writing, previewing, annotation, export, and local or GitHub-based project workflows.
